name: Cape of Illumination (Moderate)
description:
This golden cape, embroidered with vibrant red sun rays, sparkles like sunlight reflecting off the ocean.

Activate 2 command, Interact

Effect The cape glows with the effects of 4th-rank . You can Activate the cape again to Dismiss the effect.

Activate 2 envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You draw the cape and unleash a blinding flash of light. All enemies within 30 feet that can see you must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is for 1 round.

Failure The creature is for 1 round and dazzled for 1 minute. The creature can spend an Interact action rubbing its eyes to end the blinded condition.

Critical Failure The creature is blinded for 1 round and dazzled for 1 hour.
